children.heading: Policy statement
children.label: a Policy statement
children.text: It is the intent of Congress that entrance, tourism or recreational use fees for use of Federal lands and facilities not discriminate against any State or any region of the country.
identify all Federal lands and facilities that provide recreational or tourism use; and
analyze by State and region any fees charged for entrance, recreational or tourism use, if any, on Federal lands or facilities in a State or region, individually and collectively.

children.heading: Recommendations
children.label: c Recommendations
children.text: Following completion of the report in subsection (b), the Secretary, in cooperation with other affected agencies, shall prepare and submit a report by to the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources of the United States Senate, the Committee on Natural Resources of the United States House of Representatives, and any other relevant committees, which shall contain recommendations which the Secretary deems appropriate for implementing the congressional intent outlined in subsection (a).May 1, 1997
